name: california-san-francisco
description: San Francisco civic data from official city and county government websites (consolidated city-county)

config.regionName: City and County of San Francisco
config.description: San Francisco civic data from official city and county government websites (consolidated city-county)

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past San Francisco County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('San Francisco County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: San Francisco County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract San Francisco County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-san-francisco-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-san-francisco-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
The main content area containing representative data is wrapped in a div with id '__next' and a header section.
Representative cards likely use Tailwind utility classes such as 'flex', 'gap', and 'hover' for layout and interaction.
Photo URLs are relative paths starting with '/_next/static/media/' and require base URL absolutization.
Detail URLs are found in 'href' attributes of anchor tags within the representative card elements.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for San Francisco County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: San Francisco County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for San Francisco County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: San Francisco County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
